sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from "react"; import "../css/userDashboard.css"; import { FaUser, FaHeart, FaCalendarAlt, FaCog, FaMapMarkerAlt, FaBed, FaBath, FaSignOutAlt, FaCheckCircle, FaClock, FaTimesCircle, FaEdit, FaCamera, FaPhone, FaEnvelope, FaMobileAlt, FaArrowRight, FaTrash, FaBell, FaShieldAlt, FaHome, FaChevronRight } from "react-icons/fa"; /* ─── MOCK USER ─── */ const USER = { name: "Aravind Kumar", email: "aravind@gmail.com", mobile: "+91 98765 43210", avatar: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=200&q=80", role: "Tenant", joinedDate: "January 2026", verified: true, }; /* ─── SAVED PROPERTIES ─── */ const SAVED = [ { id:9, title:"3BHK Luxury Apartment", location:"Saravanampatti", price:20000, beds:3, baths:2, type:"Apartment", image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545324418-cc1a3fa10c00?w=400&q=80" }, { id:1, title:"2BHK Independent House", location:"Peelamedu", price:15000, beds:2, baths:1, type:"House", image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560185127-6ed189bf02f4?w=400&q=80" }, { id:11, title:"2BHK Modern Apartment", location:"Gandhipuram", price:14000, beds:2, baths:2, type:"Apartment", image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1512917774080-9991f1c4c750?w=400&q=80" }, ]; /* ─── BOOKINGS ─── */ const BOOKINGS = [ { id:"BK001", title:"3BHK Luxury Apartment", location:"Saravanampatti", price:20000, type:"Apartment", status:"confirmed", bookedOn:"Mar 10, 2026", visitDate:"Mar 25, 2026", owner:"Rajesh Kumar", image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545324418-cc1a3fa10c00?w=400&q=80" }, { id:"BK002", title:"2BHK House", location:"Peelamedu", price:15000, type:"House", status:"pending", bookedOn:"Mar 15, 2026", visitDate:"Mar 28, 2026", owner:"Suresh Babu", image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1560185127-6ed189bf02f4?w=400&q=80" }, { id:"BK003", title:"Men's PG Room", location:"Gandhipuram", price:7000, type:"PG", status:"cancelled", bookedOn:"Feb 20, 2026", visitDate:"Feb 25, 2026", owner:"Priya Raman", image:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507089947368-19c1da9775ae?w=400&q=80" }, ]; const STATUS_CONFIG = { confirmed: { icon:, label:"Confirmed", cls:"confirmed" }, pending: { icon:, label:"Pending", cls:"pending" }, cancelled: { icon:, label:"Cancelled", cls:"cancelled" }, }; const TABS = [ { key:"overview", label:"Overview", icon: }, { key:"saved", label:"Saved", icon: }, { key:"bookings", label:"Bookings", icon: }, { key:"settings", label:"Settings", icon: }, ]; export default function UserDashboard() { const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("overview"); const [saved, setSaved] = useState(SAVED); const [editMode, setEditMode] = useState(false); const [profile, setProfile] = useState({ name: USER.name, email: USER.email, mobile: USER.mobile, }); const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState({ email: true, sms: true, bookingUpdates: true, newListings: false, }); const removeFromSaved = (id) => setSaved(prev => prev.filter(p => p.id !== id)); const handleProfileSave = () => setEditMode(false); return (
{/* ── NAVBAR ── */}
RentSpace
Home Rentals Logout
{/* ── SIDEBAR ── */}
{/* PROFILE SUMMARY */}

{USER.name}

{USER.role}

{USER.verified && (
Verified Account
)}

Member since {USER.joinedDate}

{/* STATS */}
{saved.length} Saved
{BOOKINGS.length} Bookings
{BOOKINGS.filter(b => b.status === "confirmed").length} Confirmed
{/* NAV TABS */}
{TABS.map(t => ( ))}
{/* LOGOUT */}
{/* ── MAIN CONTENT ── */}
{/* ══ OVERVIEW TAB ══ */} {activeTab === "overview" && (

Welcome back, {USER.name.split(" ")[0]} 👋

Here's a summary of your activity

{/* STAT CARDS */}
{[ { icon:, label:"Saved Properties", val:saved.length, color:"accent" }, { icon:, label:"Total Bookings", val:BOOKINGS.length, color:"accent2" }, { icon:, label:"Confirmed", val:BOOKINGS.filter(b=>b.status==="confirmed").length, color:"green" }, { icon:, label:"Pending", val:BOOKINGS.filter(b=>b.status==="pending").length, color:"yellow" }, ].map(s => (
{s.icon}
{s.val} {s.label}
))}
{/* RECENT BOOKINGS */}

Recent Bookings

{BOOKINGS.slice(0,2).map(b => { const st = STATUS_CONFIG[b.status]; return (

{b.title}

{b.location}

{st.icon} {st.label}

₹{b.price.toLocaleString()}/mo

); })}
{/* SAVED QUICK VIEW */}

Saved Properties

{saved.slice(0,3).map(p => (

{p.title}

{p.location}

₹{p.price.toLocaleString()}/mo
))}
)} {/* ══ SAVED TAB ══ */} {activeTab === "saved" && (

Saved Properties

{saved.length} properties saved

{saved.length === 0 ? (

No saved properties

Go to listings and save properties you like!

Browse Listings
) : (

{p.type}

{p.title}

{p.location}, Coimbatore

{p.beds} Beds {p.baths} Baths
₹{p.price.toLocaleString()}/mo View
))}
)}
)} {/* ══ BOOKINGS TAB ══ */} {activeTab === "bookings" && (

My Bookings

{BOOKINGS.length} total bookings

{BOOKINGS.map(b => { const st = STATUS_CONFIG[b.status]; return (

{b.title}

{b.location}, Coimbatore

{st.icon} {st.label}
Booking ID {b.id}
Booked On {b.bookedOn}
Visit Date {b.visitDate}
Owner {b.owner}
Monthly Rent ₹{b.price.toLocaleString()}
Type {b.type}
View Property Chat Owner {b.status === "pending" && ( )}
); })}
)} {/* ══ SETTINGS TAB ══ */} {activeTab === "settings" && (

Account Settings

Manage your profile and preferences

{/* PROFILE EDIT */}

Personal Information

Update your profile details

setProfile(p => ({...p, name: e.target.value}))} />
setProfile(p => ({...p, email: e.target.value}))} />
setProfile(p => ({...p, mobile: e.target.value}))} />
{/* NOTIFICATIONS */}

Notification Preferences

Choose what notifications you receive

{[ { key:"email", label:"Email Notifications", desc:"Receive updates via email" }, { key:"sms", label:"SMS Notifications", desc:"Receive updates via SMS" }, { key:"bookingUpdates", label:"Booking Status Updates", desc:"Get notified on booking changes" }, { key:"newListings", label:"New Listings Alert", desc:"Get notified when new properties are added" }, ].map(n => (
{n.label}

{n.desc}

))}
{/* DANGER ZONE */}

Danger Zone

Delete Account

Permanently delete your account and all data

)}
); }
